name: Nottingham Athletics Track
metaTitle: Harvey Hadden Sports Village | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for Harvey Hadden Sports Village in Nottingham.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:00–22:00, Sat 06:00–18:00, Sun 08:00–18:00. Last admission is 30 minutes before closing time.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go sessions and various membership packages are available via the Active Nottingham network.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An improved Grade A athletics stadium with an 8-lane track, serving as the city's premier athletics venue.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site car parking is available with dedicated disability and parent/child bays.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Active Nottingham page for Harvey Hadden for track timetables and booking.
